display-sans.purpose: Hero line 1 and section title sans lines.

display-serif.purpose: Hero line 2 only — Playfair Display Italic.

product-name.purpose: 15px bold Inter; 2-line clamp inside unified card.

shadows.name: product-hover
shadows.purpose: Product card lift on hover — not at rest.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Product grid 3 columns; flow steps 2 columns.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Nav desktop grid; sticky PDP buy off below.

components.name: Nav Primary Button
components.description: Single orange CTA in navbar. Square corners (2px).
components.css: .ds-btn-nav-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 30px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 2px; border: none; background: #F99926; color: #ffffff; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.01em; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-nav-primary:hover { background: #ffab42; color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Hero Primary Button
components.description: Main hero CTA — pill shape, hot orange.
components.css: .ds-btn-nav-primary:focus-visible, .ds-btn-hero-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F99926; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-hero-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 44px; padding: 0 26px; border-radius: 999px; border: none; background: #ff7a00; color: #ffffff; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-hero-primary:hover { background: #ff8f1f; color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Product CTA
components.description: In-stock product card CTA — gradient orange, dark text.
components.css: .ds-btn-product-cta { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; width: 100%; padding: 11px 14px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 168, 60, 0.7); background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffb038 0%, #ff8012 42%, #e87200 100%); color: #1a1000; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); transition: filter 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-product-cta:hover { filter: brightness(1.08); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35), 0 4px 16px rgba(255, 122, 0, 0.28); }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Unified catalog tile — 1:1 media, title + price in same case, whole card clickable.
components.html:
19 in stock

Nitro Boost 1 Month

€2.50
components.css: .ds-product-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; width: 100%; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); background: #161616; color: #fafafa; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.22s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-product-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: rgba(249, 153, 38, 0.32); } .ds-product-card:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F99926; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-product-media { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; overflow: hidden; background: #121212; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); } .ds-product-img { position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; object-position: center; } .ds-product-chip { position: absolute; top: 8px; right: 8px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92); background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .ds-product-body { padding: 12px 14px 14px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; } .ds-product-name { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-product-price { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #F99926; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }

components.name: Flow Panel
components.description: Section UI mock shell with localized orange spotlight.
components.css: .ds-flow-card { position: relative; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); background: linear-gradient(180deg, #111111 0%, #0a0a0a 100%); overflow: hidden; } .ds-flow-spot { position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 85%, rgba(249, 153, 38, 0.16) 0%, transparent 55%); } .ds-flow-panel { position: relative; margin: 14px; padding: 14px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02); } .ds-flow-ui { font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Centered nav text link — muted default, white hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #fafafa; }

narrative.overview: Velora Market reads as a premium dark SaaS storefront. Pure black canvas, warm orange spotlight behind hero, Arial + Playfair Italic pairing, dashboard mock below fold. Section flow mocks and edge-to-edge product banners prove instant delivery. Depth from tonal layering and localized spotlights — not glass or ghost-card shadows.
keyCharacteristics: Drenched black canvas with one committed orange accent
Distinct UI mock patterns per flow/features card
Product banners: dynamic aspect-ratio, contain, stock pill on image

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Orange appears on ≤10% of any screen outside the hero spotlight zone and product CTAs.

rules.name: The Spotlight Rule
rules.body: Hero light stack and vl-flow-spot are the only places orange fills large ambient area.

rules.name: The Void Rule
rules.body: Homepage sections share #000000 with no gray border-top separators.

rules.name: The Pairing Rule
rules.body: Playfair Italic is reserved for the hero second line only.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow blur ≥16px combined with 1px decorative border on the same element at rest.

dos: Do use --vl-* tokens from assets/velora.css for all new landing sections.
Do keep homepage background seamless #000 between sections.
Do upload product images as wide banners; let JS set aspect-ratio from natural dimensions.
Do use distinct UI mock patterns per flow/features card.
Do verify muted text ≥4.5:1 contrast on black.
Do label hero dashboard mock as Preview (aria-hidden); use sentence-case .vl-reviews-lead.
Do keep footer styles in velora.css only — no inline styles in footer.njk.
donts: Don't look like a dark neon gaming shop with RGB glow.
Don't use generic AI SaaS patterns: cream body, metric hero, uppercase eyebrow on every section.
Don't use object-fit: cover on product banners if it crops artwork.
Don't use wireframe/skeleton placeholders in section mocks.
Don't pair 1px border with wide soft box-shadow on cards (ghost-card).
Don't revert to produce.so light blue / Inter without explicit request.
Don't use Live badges or pulsing status dots on decorative mocks.
